summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 23 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 93 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 79 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 21 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Clifford Clack — Gym Addition — make sure resources are lined up.
